chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 334 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to maintainability of petition. 04.03.2025 Ms. Shumaila Sadaf, advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Saad Fayaz, advocate for the respondent 3. On the last date, counsel was confronted as to maintainability and relief sought. Even today she remains unable to satisfy. The controversy pertains to election of Art Council. Irrespective of whether writ can be issued to the said entity, it has not been arrayed as respondent herein. Even otherwise, the allegations are fraught factual controversy the same could not be agitated without inquiry, investigation and evidence etc. The same is not amenable in writ jurisdiction. In view of foregoing, petition is found to be mis-conceived, hence dismissed. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
